text.title: vui-testing-best-practices Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the vui-testing-best-practices methodology end-to-end.

step.name: declare-layers
step.action: Declare unit / integration / user / stress with owner + cadence each.

step.name: build-unit-corpus
step.action: Build labeled utterance corpus; bucket by subgroup. Run ASR + intent classifier.

step.name: integration-test
step.action: Run end-to-end dialog flows; track completion_at_attempt_N.

step.name: user-test
step.action: Recruit ≥5 moderated users; observe behaviour; tag friction.

step.name: stress-test
step.action: Run ≥3 stress conditions (kitchen, traffic, multi-speaker, accent, interrupt). Lock LLM seeds.
